briefs.title: Klaviyo Ecosystem — Q2 2026 Trends
briefs.summary: Deep-dive into Klaviyo platform trajectory for Q2 2026. Covers AI feature rollout, pricing shifts, and competitive positioning relative to BMO's service model.
bullets: AI-powered segmentation beta opens early access for select partners — BMO clients eligible
Klaviyo raising prices ~12% on mid-tier plans from May 1 — client comms needed for 6 accounts
New predictive analytics dashboard overlaps with BMO's reporting offer — differentiate now
Send-time optimisation native feature launching Q2 — affects Nexmail positioning

briefs.title: Centr Fitness Pre-Call Research Pack
briefs.summary: Full pre-call intelligence brief for Centr Fitness ahead of onboarding discovery.
bullets: Current email program: 2 flows active (welcome + post-purchase), no segmentation
3.2% average open rate — well below fitness industry benchmark of 6.1%
Subscriber list: ~48k, 30-day active: 9k — significant re-engagement opportunity
BFCM 2025 generated 0 email revenue — major gap to close before Q4
Recommend: Full lifecycle build + SMS layer from Day 1

briefs.title: Nexmail Product Strategy v2
briefs.summary: Second iteration of Nexmail's go-to-market positioning.
bullets: Core differentiator: human-verified AI strategy — not just automated email sends
Target segment: DTC brands doing $1M–$20M in annual email revenue
Pricing model: retainer-based ($2.5k–$8k/mo) vs per-send SaaS
Competitive advantage: BMO execution layer + Nexmail intel = unmatched client ROI

competitors.name: Retention.com
competitors.summary: Strong identity resolution product. Growing fast in DTC space.
bullets: Launched native Klaviyo integration Q1 — reducing friction for mid-market DTC
Raised Series B ($40M) — accelerating sales team and product roadmap
Targeting BMO's core client base (DTC $1M–$20M ARR) aggressively
Weakness: pure tech play, no human strategy layer — BMO's core differentiator holds
competitors.action: Immediate: Update Nexmail positioning to counter Retention.com narrative

competitors.name: Yotpo
competitors.summary: Expanding from loyalty into full CRM suite.
bullets: New lifecycle product launched — bundled with loyalty
Klaviyo partnership announcement signals intent to play in the flow space
Pricing accessible for smaller brands — could pull from BMO's lower-tier pipeline
No dedicated strategy team — execution quality is self-serve
competitors.action: Monitor quarterly. Update client decks to highlight BMO strategy vs Yotpo self-serve.

competitors.name: Rejoiner
competitors.summary: Niche email automation player losing ground to native Klaviyo flows.
bullets: Declining market share as Klaviyo native features improve
Customer base skews toward smaller brands under $500k revenue
No AI roadmap visible — falling behind on product innovation
competitors.action: No action needed. Revisit in Q3.

insights.text: Klaviyo announces AI-powered segmentation beta — BMO clients eligible for early access
BFCM 2026 planning starts now — brands locking in retainer budgets in Q2
SMS opt-in rates declining post-TCPA enforcement — strategy review needed for 4 clients
Tiered loyalty outperforms points-only by 34% in retention rate (Q1 2026 data)
Nexmail competitor Retention.com raises $40M — accelerating into BMO's core market
